attacking_style: Opportunistic finisher who capitalizes on chaos. Attacks from final corner (~350m) when team plan disintegrates, showing flexibility to abandon domestique role and sprint independently.
team_tactics: Normally operates as sprint leadout domestique (formerly for Bouhanni). When designated sprinter is absent or out of position, demonstrates situational awareness to switch from support to execution role.
terrain_preference: Coastal sprint stages with technical finishes suit his ability to read chaotic situations and profit from positioning in tight corners.
vulnerability: Likely struggles in organized sprints against pure fast-finishers when team structure is intact and he must fulfill domestique duties rather than hunt own opportunities.
key_patterns: Converts from domestique to opportunist when team plan fails (1 observation only)
Attacks from technical corners in final 400m rather than pure power sprints
Shows exceptional situational awareness to recognize when designated sprinter is unavailable
form_trajectory: positive: Career-biggest win at 2023 Vuelta demonstrates emerging ability to seize opportunities beyond leadout duties
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 7
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 7
